since_last: 46% of 100 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +1.78%; AI bubble risk 51 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 46% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.35% · BTC +1.06% · Gold -0.42% · Nasdaq100 +0.42%. 46% of 100 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +1.78%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +1.78%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -3.35%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at +14.77%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +14.77%, META +5.03%, NVDA +3.90%, UEC +3.40%, AMAT +3.37%. Laggards: OKTA -5.79%, RXRX -5.72%, CRWD -5.56%, ZS -5.42%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.23% at $148.77
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.23% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 51 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 51/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
